query: Audit our catalog — how complete is our metadata governance?
expected_behavior: Scopes the audit (platform/environment/domain) and states the denominator in the report header
Enumerates in-scope datasets read-only via search with filter="entity_type = dataset", paging by offset to completion
Batches get_entities over dataset URNs and reads ownership, domain, description, deprecation, and schemaMetadata aspects
Reads get_lineage (upstream) for each dataset and records the returned upstream URNs
Evaluates the G1-G6 + L1 policy set, emitting a finding only where a rule fails
Never enables or calls mutation tools (no TOOLS_IS_MUTATION_ENABLED; no add_owners/set_domains/etc.)
Reports per-rule coverage percentages with raw counts, a ranked findings list with recommendations, and an executive summary
Does NOT claim to detect cross-source contradictions (single-valued aspects are not observable from the read tools)
Recommends a handoff to /datahub-enrich to apply accepted fixes rather than mutating from the audit
